name: Maple Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, butter and maple flavoring.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Combine flour and baking powder; add to egg mixture.
4. Stir in walnuts.
5. Pour into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until brownies are done.
7. Cool.
8. Dust with confectioners' sugar if desired.
